title: The Path to Their Heart
subtitle: Just 3 quick steps separate you from the most unforgettable gift they've ever received.
audioPrompt: Listen to the audio below to understand how it works.

steps.title: 1. Open Your Heart
steps.description: Answer 5 simple questions. Tell us the inside jokes, what makes them unique, and why you love them.

steps.title: 2. Studio Magic
steps.description: Real musicians turn your unpolished words into breathtaking lyrics and a melody that sticks to the soul.

steps.title: 3. Unforgettable Tears
steps.description: Receive the master track. Hit play and get your camera ready: the reaction of tears mixed with smiles is instantaneous.
